unsavedDescription: You have workout data that hasn't synced yet. It will be saved locally and synced when you sign back in. Sign out anyway?
activeSessionDescription: You have a workout session running. Signing out will end it and your progress will be lost. Sign out anyway?
installBanner: Add to home screen for the best experience
iosInstallSubtitle: Add this app to your home screen for the best experience
iosInstallStep1Desc: Tap the Share button at the bottom of Safari
iosInstallStep2Desc: Scroll down and tap 'Add to Home Screen'
iosInstallStep3Desc: Tap 'Add' in the top right corner
oauthConsentDescription: "{{clientName}}" wants to access your training data
oauthConsentScopesLabel: This app will be able to:
oauthConsentError: Authorization request not found or expired
